title: Terms of Use
body:
Terms of Use

These terms govern your access to edmondaporter.com. By using this website, you agree to these conditions. If you disagree with any part of these terms, do not use the website.

Intellectual Property

All content on this site belongs to Edmond A. Porter. This includes text, book excerpts, cover art, graphics, and logos. You may not reproduce, distribute, display, or modify any materials without explicit written permission from the author.

Affiliate Links and Third Parties

This site contains links to external websites. Edmond A. Porter participates in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program. We earn a commission from qualifying purchases made through Amazon links on this site.

We do not control external websites. We are not responsible for their content, privacy practices, or any financial transactions you conduct on them.

Limitation of Liability

We provide this website on an "as is" basis. We make no warranties regarding the accuracy, completeness, or availability of the content. Edmond A. Porter and the site administrators are not liable for any damages that arise from your use of this website.

Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Idaho. Any disputes related to these terms or the use of the website fall under the jurisdiction of Idaho courts.

Changes to These Terms

We may update these terms at any time. We will post the revised terms on this page. Your continued use of the website after changes are posted indicates you accept the updated terms.

Contact

If you have questions regarding these terms, contact us using the form provided on the website.
